nasb.text: and said, “My Lord, if now I have found favor in Your sight, please do not pass Your servant by.

esv.text: and said, “O Lord, if I have found favor in your sight, do not pass by your servant.

cnv.text: 說：“我主啊，我若在你眼前蒙恩，求你不要離開你的僕人。

ccb.text: 说：“我主，你们若肯赏光，请不要匆匆路过仆人这里。

csbs.text: 说：“我主啊，如果我在你眼前蒙恩，请不要路过你的仆人就走。
